examples.description: SM B-sector Wilson coefficients at matching and low scales
examples.command: hyperiso-ui wilson summary --model SM --lha reproducibility/inputs/sm_reference.flha --groups BCoefficients --coeffs C7,C8,C9,C10 --qmatch 81 --q 4.8 --order NNLO

examples.description: Scalar Wilson coefficients in the BScalar group
examples.command: hyperiso-ui wilson summary --model SM --lha reproducibility/inputs/sm_reference.flha --groups BScalarCoefficients --coeffs CQ1_MU,CQ2_MU --qmatch 81 --q 4.8 --order LO
hyperiso-ui observable summary --model SM --lha reproducibility/inputs/sm_reference.flha --observables BR_Bs__mu_mu,BR_B__Xs_gamma --order NNLO

examples.description: Binned angular observable in a fixed q2 bin
examples.command: hyperiso-ui observable summary --model SM --lha reproducibility/inputs/sm_reference.flha --observables BR_Bs__mu_mu --bins F_L_B0__K*0_mu_mu:1.1:6.0 --order NNLO

examples.description: MC uncertainty summary with fixed seed
examples.command: hyperiso-ui statistic summary --model SM --lha reproducibility/inputs/sm_reference.flha --observables BR_Bs__mu_mu,BR_B__Xs_gamma --uncertainties --draws 200 --seed 123456 --samples-csv reproducibility/outputs/statistics_samples.csv --order NNLO

examples.description: THDM BSM Wilson coefficients from an archived 2HDMC spectrum
examples.command: hyperiso-ui wilson summary --model THDM --lha reproducibility/inputs/thdm_reference.lha --spectrum true --contribution BSM --groups BCoefficients --coeffs C7,C8,C9,C10 --qmatch 81 --q 81 --order NNLO

examples.description: SUSY BSM Wilson coefficients from an archived SOFTSUSY spectrum
examples.command: hyperiso-ui wilson summary --model SUSY --lha reproducibility/inputs/susy_reference.slha --spectrum true --contribution BSM --groups BCoefficients --coeffs C7,C8,C9,C10 --qmatch 81 --q 81 --order NNLO
